title: Squared Offhand
description:
A tweak to square the offhand slot.
Also With a Programmer Art Version.
body:
Squares the offhand slot to make it look like the Hotbar.
-
![Back and forth switch of the Main hand in the hotbar and offhand.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa2f629411fe6e5877443004307a790be6dc2b0d.webp)
